findings.evidence: `TauCeti/Coordination.lean:1:module`; `rg -n 'module system|lake exe module-system|isModule|readModuleData|opt into' roadmap -S` found no roadmap target, only an unrelated `leading h` OCR note.
findings.fix: Block until the roadmap contains an explicit module-system/governance infrastructure target, or retarget the PR to material that advances an existing roadmap node.
findings.issue: The PR adds Lean module-system opt-in to the coordination contract, but no roadmap target or prerequisite for this infrastructure is identified or present.

summary: This PR has no confirmed path to a TauCetiRoadmap target. It changes Lean module-system opt-in/governance rather than advancing a roadmap node or a proximate prerequisite, so a human should add this infrastructure goal to the roadmap first if it belongs.
